title: 7000 BBY
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Year

|conflict=[[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]]<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>

The following events took place in '''7000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Dathka Graush]] initiates a [[Korriban civil war (Dathka Graush)|civil war]] on Korriban.<ref name="Atlas" />
*The [[Manderon Period]] begins.<ref name="Atlas" />
*The [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]] begins<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith" /> with an [[assault on the Jedi Order]]<ref name="TOR Encylopedia">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''</ref> in the aftermath of the [[Second Great Schism]].<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith" />
*The [[Taung/Legends|Taung]] [[Mandalore the First]] leads his followers from the planet [[Roon/Legends|Roon]] to a new world, which his followers rename [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] in his honor. {{Circa}}<ref name="Atlas" />
*The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] library [[Veeshas Tuwan]] is established on [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]].<ref name="Essential Guide to Alien Species">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>
*[[Trandosha/Legends|Trandosha]] joins the [[Galactic Republic]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Wrath of Darth Maul]]'' {{Mo}}
*[[Legacy (2006) 30|''Legacy'' (2006) 30]] {{Mo}}
*[[Legacy (2006) 32|''Legacy'' (2006) 32]] {{Mo}}
